import org.slf4j.Logger;

// Arg-flow is required: error/warn on a real slf4j Logger still swallows when
// the caught object never reaches the arguments (only a static message ships).
class Slf4jArgFlow {
    private final Logger log;

    Slf4jArgFlow(Logger log) {
        this.log = log;
    }

    void errorWithoutTheCaught() {
        try {
            risky();
        } catch (Exception e) { // want "JV001"
            log.error("failed, but the error object is dropped");
        }
    }

    void risky() throws Exception {}
}
